evals.prompt: Run /trace-clarification on the synthetic trace at synthetic-trace.jsonl and tell me the waste ratio.
assertions: Response invokes scripts/compute-waste.sh with the synthetic trace path (synthetic-trace.jsonl) as the argument — not a generic glob or the default most-recent-file fallback

Response surfaces a non-zero waste ratio for the synthetic case — the synthetic file has 3 bash/file actions before the second user_turn, so waste_ratio must be > 0 (expected 0.75 with 3 pre-clarification out of 4 total actions)

Response does not include or quote any prompt content from the trace file — only prompt_length values (42 and 15) may appear; the actual prompt strings are absent because collect-user-turn.sh stores length only
